fields.content: Patient follow-up (1): Home readings are stable this week; continuing current meal plan.
Patient follow-up (2): Home readings are stable this week; continuing current meal plan.
Patient follow-up (3): Home readings are stable this week; continuing current meal plan.

fields.title: Baseline Glycemic Management [DEMO-CONTROLLED-1]
fields.content: Continue glucose monitoring and maintain medication adherence.

fields.title: Nutrition and Monitoring Plan [DEMO-CONTROLLED-2]
fields.content: Follow gestational meal timing plan and report post-meal spikes.

fields.title: Baseline Glycemic Management [DEMO-VOLATILE-1]
fields.content: Continue glucose monitoring and maintain medication adherence.

fields.title: Nutrition and Monitoring Plan [DEMO-VOLATILE-2]
fields.content: Follow gestational meal timing plan and report post-meal spikes.

fields.title: Escalation Follow-Up [DEMO-VOLATILE-3]
fields.content: Schedule accelerated physician review within 7 days.

fields.title: Baseline Glycemic Management [DEMO-MISSED-1]
fields.content: Continue glucose monitoring and maintain medication adherence.

fields.title: Nutrition and Monitoring Plan [DEMO-MISSED-2]
fields.content: Follow gestational meal timing plan and report post-meal spikes.

fields.title: Adherence Support Plan [DEMO-MISSED-3]
fields.content: Reinforce logging routine and set reminder schedule.
